title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He suggests that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans and reflects on the implications of the capabilities achieved in systems he helped develop.
